patch.value: COMMANDS.md omits pm get and pm copy; command-families table missing get/copy/update-many/close-many

docs/COMMANDS.md is the command reference but never documents 'pm get' (the single-item read primitive used throughout AGENT_GUIDE.md:110) or 'pm copy' (core command since PR#146, has MCP tool pm_copy). Both are in PM_CORE_COMMAND_NAMES. The Command Families table (docs/COMMANDS.md:23-36) also omits update-many/close-many (they have a Bulk Operations section at :117 but no family row). Fix: add get/copy to Triage or a Read family with examples, and add a Bulk family row.

value.note: Add pm get to Triage family + examples; document pm copy; add Bulk family row

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: COMMANDS.md now documents the single-item read primitive pm get (Triage family row + --fields/--depth/--tree examples + .item.body note) and pm copy, and adds a Bulk family row for update-many/close-many. Implemented in PR (docs accuracy & contributor-reference hardening). Verified: docs-skills-gate passed (relative links incl .toon validated), docs-skills-gate.spec + guide-command.spec + files-docs-command.spec = 66 passed, quality:static passed, manual temp-dir init confirms 11 builtins incl Plan and real dirs plans/schema/runtime (no index/).

patch.value: COMMANDS.md documents pm get and pm copy; command-families table includes get and a Bulk (update-many/close-many) row.
